name: episodic-memory
description: Cross-tool episodic memory + BP-1 auto-pilot (RFC-004). All BP-1 surfaces are activation-gated and remain inert until M5 dry-run flips bp1.enabled per project.

scheduled-tasks.name: bp1-deadline-tick
scheduled-tasks.description: RFC-004 §606 T1 — Path A deadline-tick scheduled task. Fires every 5 minutes; activation-gated (no-op when project is inert).

scheduled-tasks.name: bp1-naked-entry-sweep
scheduled-tasks.description: RFC-004 §606 T1b — Path B naked-entry sweep. Fires every 1 minute (5-min age threshold = ~6 min upper bound on recovery latency); activation-gated.

slash-commands.name: bp1-auto
slash-commands.description: BP-1 auto-pilot (inert until M5 dry-run flips bp1.enabled per RFC-004 §195).
